title: scandix aurea
intro: Scandix aurea, also known as the Golden Pepperwort, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Scandix aurea include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. Scandix aurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties.
